entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC DISEASE
entities.description: The most damaging disease of pigeonpea in the Indian subcontinent, also known as the green plague

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp., a legume crop affected by sterility mosaic disease

entities.name: INDIAN SUBCONTINENT
entities.description: The geographical region where sterility mosaic disease is a major issue

entities.name: IDENTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of identifying the causal agent of sterility mosaic disease

entities.name: DETECTION
entities.description: The process of detecting the causal agent of sterility mosaic disease

entities.name: TRANSMISSION
entities.description: The process of how the causal agent of sterility mosaic disease is spread

entities.name: CAUSAL AGENT
entities.description: The biological entity responsible for causing sterility mosaic disease

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea cultivars to resist sterility mosaic disease, enabling durable production

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The long-term maintenance of pigeonpea yields to enhance farmer livelihoods

entities.name: SEMIARID TROPICS
entities.description: The specific climatic region within the Indian subcontinent where pigeonpea is grown
